zh.lifeSummary: 當Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children於大約1250年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾南吉梅朗爾時，他的父親Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children45歲，母親Mrs. Lorwith ap Madog18歲。他於1277年之前與Eva Ferch Griffith在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1305年享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children于大约1250年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾南吉梅朗爾时，他的父亲Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children45岁，母亲Mrs. Lorwith ap Madog18岁。他于1277年之前与Eva Ferch Griffith在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1305年享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

en.lifeSummary: When Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children was born about 1250, in Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children, was 45 and his mother, Mrs. Lorwith ap Madog, was 18. He married Eva Ferch Griffith before 1277, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1305, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children est né environ 1250, à Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Lorwith ap Madog, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Eva Ferch Griffith avant 1277, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1305, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children um 1250 in Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children 45 und seine Mutter Mrs. Lorwith ap Madog 18. Er hat vor 1277 in Wales, United Kingdom Eva Ferch Griffith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1305 im Alter von 56 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children è nato il circa 1250 nel Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Galles, il suo padre, Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Lorwith ap Madog, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Eva Ferch Griffith prima del 1277, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1305, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Childrenが約1250年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアペナント-メランジェルで生まれた時，父Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Childrenは45歳，母Mrs. Lorwith ap Madogは18歳であった。1277年以前にイギリスウェールズでEva Ferch Griffithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1305年に56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children(이)가 대략 1250년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 펜넌트-멀랭에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Lorwith ap Madog(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1277년 이전 영국 웨일스에서 Eva Ferch Griffith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1305년 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Lorwith ap Madog, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Eva Ferch Griffith antes 1277, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1305, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children родился около 1250 г. в местности пеннант-мелангелл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Lorwith ap Madog, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva Ferch Griffith перед 1277 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1305 г. в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children nació aproximadamente 1250, en Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Lord Iorwerth ap Madog 8 Children, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Mrs. Lorwith ap Madog, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Eva Ferch Griffith antes de 1277, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1305, a la edad de 56 años.
